pages.text: It has been some time since Jumpluff I awoke in this once unfamiliar place. During that time I have learned much about the rules by which this world operates, discovered I am not alone here, and built a new life for myself. I am very glad for the second point in particular.

At the moment, I am relaxing in the shade of am Apricorn tree writing, having already finished my other tasks for the day. I think Giovanni is preparing a late lunch in the kitchen, so I am looking forward to that.

I find myself more introspective today than usual. Things It has not been easy this past hundred or so days. A lot of experimentation and labour has been required to create a livable island here. Myself and others I have met still find the nature of my our new existences a bit existentially frightening. Still, I think we are happy.

In particular, I have found immense joy in the process of recording my personal experiences and findings during this time of discovery. I have found equal joy in sharing them with others and helping people acclimate to this world.

In addition to my daily log entries (which you are currently reading) I have recently added additional specialized entries to this journal that act as guides for certain tasks I find important for getting by here. I have mostly figured them out through experimentation, but hopefully you should be able to follow them without understanding all of the exact mechanics. I hope they make the path of anyone else pulled into this place easier. And less lonely.

Oh! Two more things I wanted to mention:$(br) - Some of the pages in my notebook mysteriously vanished. I have no idea if a person, Pokémon, or a strange natural phenomenon is responsible.$(br) - I think I know where we are.
